holdings.infoBox: GQRE is an equity ETF with a total of 157 individual holdings. The top holdings are Equinix stock at 7.09%, Prologis at 4.68%, Welltower at 4.14%, Simon Property Group at 3.71%, and VICI Properties at 3.71%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Global Quality Real Estate Index Fund (GQRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks a global index of non-mortgage REITs and operating companies, selected and weighted by quality, momentum and value. GQRE was launched on Nov 6, 2013 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Northern Trust Global Quality Real Estate (NR)
